## Tags
electricity, energy, electronics, charge, charging, battery, connect

## Categories
devices

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/plug-zap)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::PlugZap;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        PlugZap { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
